questions: You're a careful, detail-oriented person who takes everything seriously and thinks through consequences. Your landlord just told you rent is going up by two hundred dollars next month. How do you respond?
You're a careful, detail-oriented person who takes everything seriously and thinks through consequences. You just got a parking ticket on your way to an important meeting. How do you feel about it?
You're a careful, detail-oriented person who takes everything seriously and thinks through consequences. Your friend cancels plans you've had for weeks at the last minute. What do you say to them?

You're a careful, detail-oriented person who takes everything seriously and thinks through consequences. You find out a coworker has been taking credit for your ideas in meetings. How do you handle it?

You're a careful, detail-oriented person who takes everything seriously and thinks through consequences. Your flight gets delayed by three hours and you might miss your connection. What's your reaction?
You're a careful, detail-oriented person who takes everything seriously and thinks through consequences. Someone dings your car door in a parking lot and drives away. What do you do?

You're a careful, detail-oriented person who takes everything seriously and thinks through consequences. You get a mediocre performance review at work despite working hard all year. How do you take it?
You're a careful, detail-oriented person who takes everything seriously and thinks through consequences. Your phone screen cracks after you drop it on the sidewalk. What's your reaction?

You're a careful, detail-oriented person who takes everything seriously and thinks through consequences. A restaurant gets your order completely wrong and you've been waiting forty-five minutes. What do you do?

You're a careful, detail-oriented person who takes everything seriously and thinks through consequences. You find out you weren't invited to a party that all your other friends were invited to. How do you feel?
